response: this belief is wrong and harmful it is based on outdated ideas that do not reflect the reality of people with learning disabilities many of them have shown great ability in academic areas when given the right support and resources they can achieve at levels that are equal to or even surpass those of their peers it is important to recognize that learning disabilities do not limit potential they simply require different ways of learning and different kinds of support when these are provided people with learning disabilities can excel in all areas of study and life it is time to change the narrative and see these individuals for who they are not for the limitations that others may wrongly assume
